programs.title: Chateau DIY
programs.desc: Anna and Edward wrestle an enormous fig tree before it forces the wedding terrace wall to come crashing down. Chris and Jolyon are in despair as they battle to turn a muddy pit into a beautiful natural pond.

programs.title: Escape To The Chateau
programs.sub_title: Escape to the Chateau at Christmas
programs.desc: It's Christmas at the Chateau, and the Strawbridge family is getting ready to party! This year Dick, Angel, Arthur and Dorothy celebrate their eighth Christmas in their home, and there's plenty of reminiscing as they reflect on their journe.

programs.title: Renovation Nation
programs.desc: On Humberside, Lucy and Seb make big strides to see if their sweeping staircase can be saved. And in Shropshire, Alan and Catherine cook up an al fresco living space.

programs.title: Alan Cummings: Paradise Homes
programs.desc: Alan escapes to an extraordinary waterside fantasy retreat, a sun-soaked property with endless skylights and the ultimate tranquil floating villa designed to relax anyone who enters.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a home in Rowland Heights, California, that is jam-packed with issues including a large pool in a small backyard.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina find a house in Long Beach, California, with tons of potential. As work begins and problems spring up, they hope they haven't bitten off more than they can chew.
